0.details:
purpose comes with clarity
the sacrifices of today pave way for easy future
research and development are continous tass, even when we die, our works lives on
whether you do it now or not, you will be older than you're today in coming years
0.model_generation: Finding clarity in your purpose ignites the path forward. Every choice you make today, every late night and every personal sacrifice, paves the way for an easier tomorrow. When your vision is clear, your steps have meaning—and that meaning turns effort into progress. In research, development, and every creative endeavor, the work you start now lives on, outlasting your time here and impacting futures you’ll never see. Even if you pause or delay, time marches on, and in a blink, you’ll be older than you are today. So step forward with confidence: invest in your growth, embrace the challenges, and trust that each act of dedication brings you closer to lasting success. Your contributions matter, your journey is important, and with clarity guiding you, the sacrifices of today will bloom into achievements you’ll celebrate for years to come. Keep moving forward, knowing every moment of dedication shapes a brighter future.
0.final_version:
Finding clarity in your purpose creates a better path for the future. Every choices and sacrifices of today will result in nicer tomorrow that you'd be super proud of. When your vision is clear and  your strategies are realistic, meaning turns effort into progress. In research and development, every creative ideas you come up with will eventually outlive you if they're a success, and will additionally impact futures you won't be physically be a part of. Either you embark on the PhD journey now or not, you will still be older than you're now in coming years, at best, you will be filled with regrets, most likely.  So, be motivated, be inspired on the reasons you're considering this path and understand that millions of people are out there looking for this golden opportunity you got on platter of gold. 
 Keep moving forward dear, the sky is your starting point. I will always be here to support you in all ways I can.

knowing every moment of dedication shapes a brighter future.

1.details:
lived a good life worth celebrating
left a really big vaccum no one call fill
will alway be fresh in our memories because of good deeds
instead of crying, its important to be happy about the postive impacts, and continuous legacies left behind
1.model_generation:
Dear friends and family,

I was deeply sorry to learn of the passing of your beloved. While we mourn the absence of someone whose life was so beautifully lived, we honor a journey filled with kindness, laughter, and generosity. The loss leaves a void that can never be filled, yet it also reminds us of the profound impact one person can have on so many lives. Your loved one’s memory will always remain alive in our hearts through moments of compassion and joy. Instead of tears alone, let us celebrate the positive effects of a life well-lived and the enduring legacies created by selfless deeds. May those cherished memories bring comfort and inspire us to carry forward the same spirit of love and service. Please accept my heartfelt condolences and know that you are in my thoughts as we remember a soul whose influence will continue to shine.

With warmest sympathy,
1.final_version:
Friends and family, I'm writing this piece with mixed emotions. Death destroys desires, and cancel out pllans. While we mourn the absence of the deceased, who lived an exemplary life, I'm partially filled with sadness that he left us, while partially happy about how he lived, lives he touched, impacts he made and tears he turned to laughter. 
 The loss leaves a vaccum that can't be filled, yet it also reminds us of the great impact one person can have on so many lives. He literally sees helping others his primary assignment. In his words, "I live my life to be impactful to atleast one person every day I step out". His memory will always remain fresh in our hearts. Urge you all to not be sad, let us celebrate the positive effects of a life well-lived and the enduring legacies created by selfless deeds. 
 Kindly accept my condolences.

someone whose life was so beautifully lived, we honor a journey filled with kindness, laughter, and generosity.
through moments of compassion and joy.
May those cherished memories bring comfort and inspire us to carry forward the same spirit of love and service.

nd know that you are in my thoughts as we remember a soul whose influence will continue to shine.

With warmest sympathy,

2.details:
for igniting hope in my heart again, i will appreciate you.
alot of humans can help but would not, just for the fun of it. you're selfless and nice to have help
the sincere appreciation goes to you, the generosity is not taken lightly
2.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I hope this note finds you well. I wanted to let you know how profoundly your kindness has affected me. For igniting hope in my heart again, I am eternally grateful. In a world where many hesitate to help unless there’s something in it for them, your selflessness and genuine compassion shine brilliantly. You offered your support simply because you cared, and that generosity has not gone unnoticed or unappreciated. Your willingness to lend a hand has reminded me that true kindness still exists. Please know that my appreciation is heartfelt; your generosity is not taken lightly. Having someone like you to lean on has made all the difference, and I feel blessed to have had your support during this time. Your impact on my life will always be cherished and remembered. Thank you for being such a remarkable person and for restoring my faith in human goodness.

Sincerely,
2.final_version:
Dear Sir,
I hope this note finds you well. I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your kindness.  You re-ignited hope in my heart after I've given up, thanks alot. 
In a world filled with wicked and heartless swines who only help if there is personal gain, you acted so selfless, indeed, you'r God sent. 
You offered your support because you will to have positive impact i a stranger's life, that generosity is unappreciated. Your kindness gives me hope about humanity once again. If th world have good numbers of caring hearts like yours, thw world be a better place than it is.  Your impact will forever live in my heart, greatly be cherished and remembered. Thank you.

where many hesitate to help unless there’s something in it for them, your selflessness and genuine compassion shine brilliantly.
willingness to lend a hand has reminded me that true kindness still exists. Please know that my appreciation is heartfelt; your generosity is not taken lightly.
Having someone like you to lean on has made all the difference, and I feel blessed to have had your support during this time.

for being such a remarkable person and for restoring my faith in human goodness.

Sincerely,

3.details:
The memory of our young days still lives on
I'm happy to hear you got your dream job, you worked really hard for and deserved it way long
been a while, a good number of schoolmate back then lives in my city, we often meet up
3.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I hope this letter finds you well. The memory of our young days still lives on in my mind—racing home after classes, sharing secrets under the old oak tree, and dreaming of what the future might hold. I was thrilled to hear that you landed your dream job; you’ve worked so hard for it and truly deserved it all along. It’s inspiring to see your dedication paying off.

It’s been too long since we last caught up. A good number of our schoolmates have settled in my city and we meet up regularly, swapping stories and laughing over old jokes. I often think how great it would be to have you join us next time you’re in town.

Let’s plan a call soon or, better yet, a visit. I’d love to hear more about your new role and share some recent adventures of my own.

Looking forward to reconnecting.

Warmest wishes,
Alex
3.final_version:
Hi Buddy

Trust you're good mate. The memory of our young days still lives on in my mind, fresh like vegetable. You know, been notorious together, teasing seniors, mocking friends and dreaming of what the future holds.
 I'm so excited to know that you landed your dream job; you’ve worked so hard for it and truly deserved it all along. It’s inspiring to see your dedication paying off.

It’s been so long we catch up, a good number of our schoolmates have settled in my city and we meet up regularly, catching up on old days and sweet memories, your name literally comes up always. 

I'd appreciate you visit our city soon, after all you're a boss now, more free time for you. 
Looking forward to reconnecting.
Kind regards

4.details:
the reward of a good opposite sex buddy is marriage
bonding is important in marriage and you guys already have that, great
marriage comes with it's demands, be patient, and respect your partner
4.model_generation: My beloved, from the first time we laughed until dawn I sensed something extraordinary growing between us. Our friendship taught me trust, joy, and the comfort of knowing someone truly sees me. Today, surrounded by those we love, I celebrate the reward of a good opposite-sex buddy: the promise of marriage. I promise to honor the bond we’ve already built, nurturing it every day with patience and laughter. I will listen with an open heart when you speak, support your dreams as if they were my own, and stand by your side through life’s quiet moments and its greatest demands. I vow to respect your needs, cherish your strengths, and learn from our differences. Together, we will face challenges hand in hand and grow stronger in love. I give you my unwavering devotion, my kindness, and my respect, and I look forward to building our future as partners, best friends, and soulmates.
4.final_version:
Hello everbody, I'm happy to be a witness to this great union today. Marriage is beautiful if properly done. There boxes to be ticked before talking marriage. I know the couple very well, we're friends for some decades now. I can beat my chest on thier individual personalities. I'm SUPER EXCITED TO BE HERE. Why throw you best friend away when you can marry them, that's my slogan, and it's part of the reason this marriage is possible today.
Marriage are funny these days, lots of strangers in marriage, without zero points of compatibility, I'm happy to say here that this beautiful couple are joined by God i heaven, their is out of this world, and that makes me super proud.
Dear friends, marriage can be tough if one party or both fail to understand their roles and essence of marriage. Marriage is far from dating, you are now totally vulnerable to the other party. they're your best freinds who you have to share good and bad times with, respect your partner and keep zero secret from them, and boom, you will have blissful marriage.
Cheers to this good moment

5.details:
my intentions were good but sadly i could not do much
i know this is hurtful, but i need your forgiveness, this relationship matters
i want to accept my apology sincerely
5.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I want to apologize for my recent actions. My intentions were good, but I now see that my efforts fell short and caused you hurt. It pains me to know I let you down when you deserved better. I value our relationship more than words can express, and I regret that I could not do more to support you. I understand that my shortcomings have been hurtful, and I ask for your forgiveness. Please know that I accept full responsibility and am committed to learning from this. Your feelings and our bond matter deeply to me, and I will do everything I can to rebuild your trust. I deeply cherish what we share, and I want to make amends in any way that feels right to you. I hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me. Thank you for taking the time to read this.

Sincerely,
5.final_version:
Hi buddy.
I'm writing this with tears in my eyes, regret in my  heart and sadness all over. If i knew i will offend you this huge one today, i would have removed such day from the calender if i have  the power too. The deed has been done, I'm sincerely seeking your forgiveness. Our bond is beyond any adversary. It's been a long time coming. I don't want our years of love and sacrifices to go into total waste because of an accidental reaction and my non-challant attitude. I hold you in high esteem and never ready to lose you no matter what comes in between us. Love is stronger when we offend eachother and grow past it. Relationship are meant to be tested and checked. The genuity of it all is to come out victorious whenever such test comes by. I want you to accept my heartfelt aplogy and let's move forward in love and meaning.
My sincere apology buddy, Love you
